zh.lifeSummary: 當Otto IV. von Ravensberg於1276年出生在多易傑 德莫可拉迪 雷普布利可羅斯托克可萊斯 巴德 多朗拉文斯格時，他的父親Otto III. von Ravensberg30歲，母親Hedwig zur Lippe und von Rheda34歲。他於1313年與Margaretha von Berg zu Windeck結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1329年5月6日在他的家鄉享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Otto IV. von Ravensberg于1276年出生在多易傑 德莫可拉迪 雷普布利可羅斯托克可萊斯 巴德 多朗拉文斯格时，他的父亲Otto III. von Ravensberg30岁，母亲Hedwig zur Lippe und von Rheda34岁。他于1313年与Margaretha von Berg zu Windeck结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1329年5月6日在他的家乡享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Otto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a short form of any of the various Germanic compound personal names containing the element od, ot ‘prosperity, wealth’ ( compare the corresponding Old English ēad in names such as Edward and Edwin ). St Otto of Bamberg ( d. 1139 ) was a missionary to the Pomeranians. Otto the Great ( 912–73 ) is generally regarded as the founder of the Holy Roman Empire, and the name has been borne by several members of German and Austrian royal houses. It was recorded occasionally among immigrants to England from the Low Countries in the 14th century, but failed to establish itself. Since the 19th century it has again been used occasionally in the English-speaking world, mostly among immigrants from Germanic countries.

nameMeanings.name: IV.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Otto IV. von Ravensberg was born in 1276, in Ravensberg, Bad Doberan, Rostock, East Germany, his father, Otto III. von Ravensberg, was 30 and his mother, Hedwig zur Lippe und von Rheda, was 34. He married Margaretha von Berg zu Windeck in 1313. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 6 May 1329, in his hometown, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Otto IV. von Ravensberg est né en 1276, à Ravensberg, Kreis Bad Doberan, Rostock, Allemagne de l'Est, son père, Otto III. von Ravensberg, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Hedwig zur Lippe und von Rheda, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Margaretha von Berg zu Windeck en 1313. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 6 mai 1329, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Otto IV. von Ravensberg 1276 in Ravensberg, Kreis Bad Doberan, Rostock, Deutsche Demokratische Republik geboren wurde, war sein Vater Otto III. von Ravensberg 30 und seine Mutter Hedwig zur Lippe und von Rheda 34. Er hat 1313 Margaretha von Berg zu Windeck geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 6. Mai 1329 im Alter von 53 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

ko.lifeSummary: Otto IV. von Ravensberg(이)가 1276년 동독 로스톡 크레이스 바드 도베란 레이븐스버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Otto III. von Ravensberg(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Hedwig zur Lippe und von Rheda(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1313년 Margaretha von Berg zu Windeck(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1329년 5월 6일 그의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Otto IV. von Ravensberg родился в 1276 г. в местности равенсбирг, крис бад добиран, ростокк, Восточная Германия, его отцу по имени Otto III. von Ravensberg было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Hedwig zur Lippe und von Rheda, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaretha von Berg zu Windeck в 1313 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 6 мая 1329 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 53 лет.
